name: Three-in-One Onion Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat all ingredients at medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
2. Serve immediately or refrigerate several hours.
3. Serve with vegetable dippers or tortilla chips. Makes 2 cups.
4. To heat: Microwave all ingredients in a 1 quart microwave-safe bowl on HIGH for 3 minutes, stirring every minute.
5. To make ahead: Prepare as directed, cover. Refrigerate overnight.
